novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Before the 220s, he was only a minor officer under Gan Ning, and so most of his achievements before then (including the slaying of Zhang Liao) are fictional

sections.biography-source-undefined: Ding Feng, styled Chengyuan, was from Anfeng, Lujiang. When young, because of his valiance and bravery, he became a minor general, subordinate to Gan Ning, Lu Xun, Pan Zhang.

full_text:
Ding Feng (Chengyuan) 丁奉 (承淵)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ding Feng (丁奉), styledChengyuan (承淵), was born in An Feng County, Lu Jiang (Presently He Qui, An Hui Province). Famous Wu officer, assassinated Sun Chen with Zhang Bu. Defeated Wei at Dongxing. Ding Feng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Ding Feng lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.

BiographySource Undefined
Ding Feng, styled Chengyuan, was from Anfeng, Lujiang. When young, because of his valiance and bravery, he became a minor general, subordinate to Gan Ning, Lu Xun, Pan Zhang.
